content: We can integrate the 2025 ICM curiosity mechanism as a pluggable ACP-compatible external harness component in the OpenClaw autonomous agent framework, where intrinsic reward signals from ICM act as dynamic trigger inputs that rewrite the LLM’s base instructions to prioritize unexplored tool use and environment interaction. This turns OpenClaw’s static agent harness into a self-directed exploration system that generates its own learning goals without external task rewards.
source_topics: agent harness components ACP openclaw autonomous agent framework
trigger_topic: agent harness components ACP openclaw autonomous agent framework
